category_sources: Official Stellar validator docs describe Stellar Core as the node program used to stay in sync and participate in consensus.
source_facts.description says Stellar Core is the backbone of the Stellar network.
display_name_sources: Official Stellar docs and GitHub repository use the display name Stellar Core.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository is the source repository documentation surface.
Official Stellar validator docs explain installing, configuring, and maintaining Stellar Core validator nodes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/stellar/stellar-core, so repo was not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Stellar validator docs describe nodes, validators, and consensus participation.
source_facts.description identifies it as Stellar network backbone software.
